name: postgres-backend
description: Create PostgresBackend class that wraps SqlBackend (compilation) + ISqlExecutor (execution) for unified IBackend interface
acceptanceCriteria: execute() method: compiles query via SqlBackend, executes via ISqlExecutor, normalizes results
Calls normalizeRow() on each result row before returning
capabilities property declares supported operators (inherits from SqlBackend)
Stateless except for executor reference (no internal caching)
Unit tests verify compilation + execution + normalization pipeline
